hooks.command: cd /d/Projects/lottery-analyzer && if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- Lottery-Analyzer-history.md 2>/dev/null; then git add Lottery-Analyzer-history.md && git commit -m "Update Lottery-Analyzer-history $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null && printf '{"systemMessage":"✓ Lottery-Analyzer-history.md push GitHub แล้ว"}'; else printf '{"systemMessage":"⚠ Lottery-Analyzer-history.md ยังไม่อัพเดต session นี้"}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: กำลัง push Lottery-Analyzer-history ไป GitHub...
